fields.name: Depreciation Table Code
fields.tooltip:
Displays the code for the depreciation table that this line belongs to.
When you set up the depreciation table line, the program automatically copied the code from the Code field on the depreciation table header.

fields.name: Period No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the depreciation period that this line applies to.

fields.name: Period Depreciation %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the depreciation percentage to apply to the period for this line.

fields.name: No. of Units in Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the units produced by the asset this depreciation table applies to, during the period when this line applies.
